name: Sync Worker
purpose: Cloudflare Worker that mediates between IndexedDB and R2 for note synchronisation.
responsibilities: Reconcile against the authoritative version in R2
Surface conflicts back to the client
internalStructure: Single Worker entrypoint dispatching to /push, /pull, /conflict handlers. Internal modules: deltaParser, conflictDetector, r2Adapter.

interfaces.name: POST /sync/push
interfaces.description: Accepts a batch of pending deltas.

interfaces.name: GET /sync/pull
interfaces.description: Returns deltas the client has not yet seen.

interfaces.name: syncMetrics
interfaces.description: Per-batch latency and conflict count published to the metrics sink.

tradeoffs: Stateless Worker design simplifies failover but rules out long-lived in-memory caches; we accept the extra cold-start cost.
notes: Watch the 50 ms CPU budget per request on the free tier.
